text.title: Tech Debt Slot Quota Policy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Policy says 'some time'; quota erodes to zero in 3 sprints.
Sprints repeatedly skip debt; velocity drops 40% over a year.
antipattern.fix: Wire hard block into sprint planner.

antipattern.symptom: Policy in repo with no owner; ignored under stakeholder pressure.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires named owner + review timestamp.
